channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 20 Jun: Harare mainly clear · high 20° / low 9°
item.description: Harare: high 20°, low 9° (mainly clear) · Bulawayo: high 19°, low 11° (light drizzle) · Mutare: high 18°, low 13° (drizzle) · Gweru: high 17°, low 10° (light drizzle) · Masvingo: high 18°, low 13° (light drizzle) · Victoria Falls: high 23°, low 15° (overcast) Tsumo yezuva: Chiri mumusakasaka chinozvinzwira. (People take advice that pertains to them, even in a group.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
